message:
fix(types/rref): Update tests to use Budget::INFINITE constant

Fixes test compilation by updating Budget constant references:

- Changed Budget::UNLIMITED to Budget::INFINITE in rref unit tests
- Affects: rref_is_copy_and_clone, rref_equality, rref_accessors,
  rref_debug_format tests

The Budget type uses INFINITE as the canonical name for the unbounded
budget constant. This aligns with the semantic meaning (infinite
resources available) rather than the older UNLIMITED naming.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
